UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the compassionate, radiant face of Demeter as a symbol of growth, fertility, and abundance in your life
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the power or authority aspect of Demeter; instead, focus on her nurturing qualities
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Empress card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, warm, uplifting, hopeful, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the Queen's control, envy, and manipulation through her black widow gown, poisoned apple, and mirror obsidian comb.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing Snow White's innocence or the Empress's traditional nurturing qualities in this reversed orientation.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Empress card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, harp, strings, flute, minor, contemplative, ethereal, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in an between position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the The Empress card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the Lady of the Lake's connection to abundance, mysticism, and her role as a guardian.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the sword she holds aloft, focusing instead on her peaceful demeanor.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the The Empress card in an between position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, warm, ethereal, majestic, growth, instrumental
